title: Just Tic Tac Toe
description:
A playable game of Tic Tac Toe in minecraft.
why? cause why not!


This is also the first mod I have ever made that I have uploaded publicly.
body:
Play Tic Tac Toe in minecraft!

XO Tile
Click the xo tile to make it an x and shift click to make it an o. to reset it you just need to hit it.

TicTacToe Core
outputs a redstone power of 1 when 3 xo tiles above it are in a row of x's or o's. you can power it with a power above 1 to reset all xo tiles above it. so you could automate it reseting.


Because Im not the best mod maker the TicTacToe Core block doesnt seem to update its redstone output and I dont know how to fix it. You can cause a update to the redstone touching the core which should fix it.


This was made in mcreator. I like visual coding.
